name: Derelict: Kepler Station
description: Sci-fi. The salvage engineer Vega boards a dead orbital station to recover its reactor logs — and finds Sentinel Unit 7, a security drone still running its last order to kill intruders. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

effects.name: EMP Shock
effects.description: An electromagnetic pulse scrambles augments and reflexes.

effects.name: Plasma Burn
effects.description: A cutting torch or drone bolt sears through the suit.

effects.name: Irradiated
effects.description: A dose of hard radiation from the failing reactor core.

items.name: Med-Injector
items.description: An auto-injector of trauma foam and stimulants that seals wounds fast.

items.name: EVA Suit
items.description: A reinforced vacuum suit — heavy, but it turns shrapnel and holds pressure.
